query: SELECT id, title, cdnUrl FROM media_catalogue WHERE (title LIKE '%V1%' OR title LIKE '%V2%' OR title LIKE '%V3%' OR title LIKE '%V4%' OR title LIKE '%V5%' OR title LIKE '%relay spinner%' OR title LIKE '%dungeon%' OR title LIKE '%grey matter%' OR title LIKE '%flight deck%' OR title LIKE '%starborne%' OR title LIKE '%scholar%' OR title LIKE '%middle%' OR title LIKE '%intro%' OR title LIKE '%thumbnail%' OR title LIKE '%title card%' OR title LIKE '%video%') AND category != 'governance-icard' ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 30;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2GX11Pnc2Gj5TH4.2b4c6ce847b1 --database EPdHLKrneifLpbtrLUugQB --execute SELECT id, title, cdnUrl FROM media_catalogue WHERE (title LIKE '%V1%' OR title LIKE '%V2%' OR title LIKE '%V3%' OR title LIKE '%V4%' OR title LIKE '%V5%' OR title LIKE '%relay spinner%' OR title LIKE '%dungeon%' OR title LIKE '%grey matter%' OR title LIKE '%flight deck%' OR title LIKE '%starborne%' OR title LIKE '%scholar%' OR title LIKE '%middle%' OR title LIKE '%intro%' OR title LIKE '%thumbnail%' OR title LIKE '%title card%' OR title LIKE '%video%') AND category != 'governance-icard' ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 30;
